positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a cosmic forest scene. Deep indigo night sky filled with nebulae, gentle crescent moons, and glowing constellations that connect to stylized, ancient-looking trees. The trees have bioluminescent accents, appearing like glowing root systems and leaf clusters. The foreground features silhouetted fauna—a graceful deer and a soaring owl—grazing beneath the glow. Style: Line art mixed with digital watercolor wash, high contrast, flat vector elements for the main shapes, and subtle radial gradients for depth. Composition: Centered, symmetrical, highly detailed yet readable. Lighting: Dramatic chiaroscuro effect, emphasizing glowing elements against deep shadow. Color Palette: Nebula blues, deep purples, accented by emerald green and cyan luminescence. Print-friendly, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, messy, dirty, text, logo, watermark, low resolution, artifacts, bad anatomy, cropped, out of frame, extra limbs, sketch, ugly
